case_title: PHILIPP SCHREIER TRUST VS VACAFLOR PEDRO

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT VACAFLOR PEDRO

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PHILIPP SCHREIER TRUST RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VACAFLOR PEDRO $4,609.81 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,624.81 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CASE WAS ACTUALLY HEARD BY JUDGE CHOPPELAS.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,609.81 FILED BY PHILIPP SCHREIER TRUST AS TO DEFENDANT VACAFLOR PEDRO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-16-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
APPINTMENT OF ATTY, ALAN J. TAVELMAN FOR PLTF METROPOLITAN ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, ASSIGNEE OF RECORDS, FILED.
